# EvenTime

EvenTime is India's student-first event discovery platform. Curators submit events. Students discover hackathons, fests, workshops, and more.

## Key Pages
- / : Homepage with personalized event feed
- /events/[slug] : Individual event details
- /leaderboard : Top event curators
- /cities/[city] : Events filtered by city (e.g. Hyderabad, Bangalore)
- /categories/[category] : Events filtered by category

## Categories
Hackathon, Workshop, College Fest, Startup Event, Networking Event, Webinar, and 15 more.

## Target Audience
College students and young professionals in India.
